ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Receipt For Blocked Account
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Robert Schiffner.

Mr. Urbatsch stated that the corrected proof of service is attached to the supplement that was filed on May 22, 2014 and that the $8,300.00 figure will be adjusted to represent the correct statutory fee. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for and with Robert Schiffner.

The Court noted that Gregg Schiffner is not present and that his letter is ex parte communication that will not be considered. Mr. Urbatsch stated that he did not received the letter. The Court granted the Petition for Letter of Administration (order for the same signed in open court). Bond in the amount of $230,000.00 is required. The Court instructed the Clerk to return the letter to Gregg Schiffner.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-16-2012 Continued To Aug-06-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Line 54 PES-12-295759: Mercy Hall appeared with and on behalf of petitioner Robert Schiffner. Greg Schiffner appeared to object.

The Court continued the matter to August 6, 2012 and required that objections must be in writing and filed by July 30, 2012.

Notes taken by Judge Peter J. Busch.
